name: Haleon plc American Depositary Shares (Each representing two Ordinary Shares)
summary: Haleon plc is a consumer healthcare company that develops, manufactures, and markets a range of over-the-counter medicines, vitamins, minerals, and supplements, and oral health products. Its brands include Sensodyne, Panadol, Advil, and Centrum. Haleon plc is headquartered in Weybridge, United Kingdom.
